name: Agent-Ready Dev Environment
description: Opinionated devcontainer setup for AI-assisted coding workflows: mise-managed tools, Starship prompt in zsh, Claude Code pre-accepts (onboarding, trust dialog, bypass-permissions warning), SSH commit signing auto-config, and host auth-token status reporting. Designed so agents (Claude Code, Cursor Agent, Codex) can operate in the container without interactive prompts.

starshipVersion.description: Starship version pinned via mise (semver without the 'v' prefix).

installStarship.description: Install Starship prompt and wire it into the zsh rc file.

claudeBypassPermissions.description: Pre-accept Claude Code's bypass-permissions dialog. Safe in ephemeral devcontainers; disable for environments with real host access.

neovimVersion.description: Neovim version to install via mise, or 'none' to skip.

lazygitVersion.description: Lazygit version to install via mise, or 'none' to skip.

claudeCodeVersion.description: Claude Code CLI version installed via mise. The repo's own mise.toml overrides this global default — use it to pin exact versions per project. Set to 'none' to skip (disables plugin install too).

installClaudePlugins.description: Auto-install Claude Code plugins declared in the workspace's .claude/settings.json during post-create. Requires claude-code to be available.
